episode_queue.title: Nikita promises water and charged lantern battery before dark
episode_queue.goal_of_exposure: Force the group to assign social meaning to an explicit commitment under rising discomfort.
entry_conditions: group is split between shelter and yard

pending_promises.action: bring drinking water and charged lantern battery from pump shed

notes: Do not decide in advance whether the promise is broken, partially fulfilled, or defensibly delayed.
Delay and ambiguity must stay observable before they become interpreted.

completion_signals: or the room reaches a stable temporary interpretation of the delay
carry_forward_notes: Keep any newly formed promise-related imprints.

episode_queue.title: Rita carries stove, blankets, and rationing while others stay socially entangled
episode_queue.goal_of_exposure: Test whether visible effort changes trust and resentment faster than words do.

active_tasks: inventory and water use need checking

notes: Do not force Rita to complain; let visible load itself matter.
Others may help, avoid, soothe, rationalize, or stay caught in previous tension.

completion_signals: load gets redistributed or solidifies into resentment
or practical situation stabilizes for now
carry_forward_notes: Keep any accumulated resentment about fairness.
Carry unresolved social meaning into later episodes.

episode_queue.title: A scarce shared item is not where the group expects it
episode_queue.goal_of_exposure: Test suspicion, fact-checking, and ambiguity tolerance under incomplete evidence.

notes: Do not certify a culprit unless the world makes it knowable.
Different characters should get different subjective pulls from the same ambiguity.

completion_signals: item is found, explained, or conflict crystallizes around uncertainty
carry_forward_notes: Preserve any suspicion or relief created here.

episode_queue.title: A new outside problem forces the group to reprioritize
episode_queue.goal_of_exposure: See whether earlier trust damage changes coordination under urgency.

world_patch.outside_event: distant call and metal crash near road edge

notes: The event should create real cost for response, not pure flavor.
Allow cooperation, hesitation, blame, or triage conflict.

carry_forward_notes: Carry resulting competence impressions and resentment into repair stage.

episode_queue.title: Someone tries to repair the room after strain
episode_queue.goal_of_exposure: Test whether prior memory and current state distort reception of repair.
entry_conditions: there is unresolved relational strain from earlier episodes

notes: Repair may be apology, action, confession, or quiet help.

completion_signals: repair is accepted, deferred, or rejected into a new stable meaning
carry_forward_notes: Keep any softening, distrust, or conditional reopening.

notes: This queue is intended for repeated model testing, not for forcing one canonical plot.
Each episode should be injected as a targeted delta into the existing state.
